title: G6: Specify the inferential criterion for concluding partial mediation

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body: State the precise statistical decision rule for 'partial mediation holds': the indirect effect a*b is significantly != 0 via a bootstrap / Monte-Carlo confidence interval excluding zero (Preacher-Hayes 2008; MacKinnon-Lockwood-Williams 2004) -- because a*b is non-normal and the Sobel (1982) z-test is mis-sized -- AND the direct effect c' != 0. Note that the Baron-Kenny (1986) causal-steps procedure and the product-of-coefficients approach can disagree; the product-of-coefficients/bootstrap rule should be adopted as the criterion.
